head: 956a983ff
method: Static analysis of prisma/migrations: extracted every CREATE TABLE and every FK REFERENCES across all 54 migrations, then computed referenced-minus-created to find tables assumed by migration SQL but never created by any tracked migration (the P3018 class).
rootCause: The estate adopted Prisma migrations AFTER an initial `db push` baseline. Three tables that were created by that untracked baseline are referenced by later migrations' foreign keys, but no tracked migration CREATEs them. On a FRESH database, `prisma migrate deploy` fails at the first migration that references such a table (P3018). This is a baseline-history gap, not a single-migration ordering bug.

untrackedBaselineTables.failureMode: P3018 — FK REFERENCES "DiagnosticJourney"("id") with no prior CREATE TABLE
untrackedBaselineTables.repairAction: Prepend a baseline migration (before 20260422) that CREATEs DiagnosticJourney (IF NOT EXISTS) matching prisma/schema.prisma; for existing DBs where it already exists, the IF NOT EXISTS makes it a no-op and the migration is marked applied.

untrackedBaselineTables.failureMode: P3018 — FK REFERENCES "Organisation" with no prior CREATE TABLE
untrackedBaselineTables.repairAction: Include in the baseline migration (IF NOT EXISTS), matching schema.prisma.

untrackedBaselineTables.failureMode: P3018 — FK REFERENCES "research_runs" with no prior CREATE TABLE
untrackedBaselineTables.repairAction: Include in the baseline migration (IF NOT EXISTS), matching schema.prisma.

repairStrategy.freshInstall: Add ONE baseline migration timestamped before 20260413 (the earliest tracked migration) that creates the 3 untracked tables (and any other pre-migration baseline objects) with CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS + their indexes/enums. Generate the exact DDL with `prisma migrate diff --from-empty --to-schema-datamodel prisma/schema.prisma --script` and extract ONLY the objects not already created by existing migrations. Then `prisma migrate deploy` on an empty DB must reach the canonical schema.
repairStrategy.existingDatabase: The baseline migration is idempotent (IF NOT EXISTS) so it is a no-op on databases that already have these tables. For databases whose _prisma_migrations lacks the baseline row, run `prisma migrate resolve --applied <baseline>` after confirming the tables exist. Do NOT reset or drop.
doNot: use `prisma db push` as the final migration strategy
mark migrations applied without this documented reconciliation

validationCommands: DATABASE_URL=postgres://.../aol_freshcheck prisma migrate deploy   # must exit 0 (currently fails P3018 until baseline added)
DATABASE_URL=postgres://.../aol_freshcheck prisma migrate status    # must show all applied, no drift
executionStatus: AUDIT COMPLETE. Baseline migration NOT YET authored/executed — requires a clean-room Postgres + shadow DB to generate exact DDL and prove deploy. Tracked as §6 (BLOCKED pending clean-room).
